caption: A group of people wearing aprons and gloves are gathered around a table covered with napa cabbage and red chili paste, actively engaged in the traditional Korean communal kimchi-making process known as Kimjang.

The image depicts a person wearing black gloves and an apron, actively handling a large piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with similar seasoned cabbage, indicative of the traditional Korean communal kimchi-making process known as Kimjang.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving South Korean flags, celebrating an event marked by the text "제104주년" on a banner, indicating a significant anniversary.

The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some holding or wearing the Taegeukgi, the national flag of Korea, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.

The image depicts a person adorned in a vibrant red hanbok with intricate floral embroidery, standing in an indoor setting with traditional wooden architecture, possibly preparing for or participating in a Korean traditional wedding ceremony.

A couple dressed in vibrant hanbok, adorned with intricate patterns, sit opposite each other at a ritual table, engaging in a traditional ceremony, surrounded by wooden mandarin ducks and candles, under a backdrop of wooden lattice windows and a white curtain.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a wooden table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, pastries, and rice cakes, alongside a white teapot and red cups, all set against a backdrop of calligraphic panels.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered around a ritual table adorned with various food offerings, performing deep bows as part of an ancestral rite known as Jesa.
The image depicts a group of people standing in a line on a paved area, facing a statue that appears to be part of a memorial or historical site, with trees and greenery in the background.

The image depicts a group of seven men dressed in formal black suits and ties, standing solemnly in front of a grass-covered burial mound adorned with white flowers and a small South Korean flag, indicating a Korean grave-tending rite known as Seongmyo.
The Cheomseongdae observatory stands as a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, illuminated against a dark night sky, casting a pinkish hue on its structure.
The Cheomseongdae observatory is a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, situated in an open field surrounded by trees and distant hills under a clear sky.
The Gyeongbokgung palace is illuminated at night, showcasing its traditional wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms.

The Gyeongbokgung palace is a traditional Korean structure featuring wooden pavilions with upturned eaves, vibrant dancheong paintwork, and elevated stone platforms, surrounded by a clear blue sky and lush greenery.

The image depicts Cheonggyecheon, an urban stream in Seoul, characterized by its shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and pedestrian walkways, with trees displaying autumn foliage and modern buildings in the background.
The statue depicts Admiral Yi Sun-shin in Joseon military armor, holding a sword, standing on a pedestal.

A man and woman dressed in black traditional Korean clothing are performing a Jeol and Sebae, kneeling on the floor with their hands touching the ground, facing each other in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.
The image shows two children performing Jeol and Sebae, kneeling on the floor with their hands touching the ground, dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, while an adult observes them.
A young boy and girl are engaged in a traditional Korean Jeol and Sebae ritual, kneeling on the floor with their hands touching the ground, dressed in colorful hanboks.
The statue depicts King Sejong the Great seated in traditional Joseon robes, wearing a winged crown, with Korean text inscribed on the base.
The statue depicts King Sejong the Great seated on a throne, adorned in traditional Joseon robes and wearing an ikseongwan, with Korean text inscribed at its base.
The image shows a person flying a large, colorful kite with a long tail that extends into the sky, featuring vibrant rainbow colors.
The image shows a person flying a colorful kite in an open grassy field under a clear sky.
The image shows a group of people seated on the floor around a colorful Yutnori game board, which features vibrant floral patterns and four wooden sticks placed at its center.

The image shows two children wearing traditional Korean hanbok, sitting on the floor, with wooden sticks (yut) in mid-air above them, indicating they are playing Yutnori, a traditional Korean board game.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae dance in a large circle formation on a wooden platform near a body of water with a bridge in the background.

A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok, featuring vibrant red and blue colors with intricate patterns, are performing a circular dance on a stage under a full moon, holding hands in a synchronized formation.

The image depicts a performer in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with purple accents and a long blue skirt, adorned with a pink sash, engaging in a Mask Dance (Talchum) performance, characterized by their open arms and expressive pose.
The image displays an array of colorful wooden masks with various expressions and designs, indicative of traditional Korean masked dance-drama performances.

The image shows a bowl of Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, garnished with green herbs and pieces of white meat, accompanied by wooden chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
The image shows a pot containing Ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red spicy broth, garnished with green onions and corn kernels.

The image displays a box containing neatly arranged gimbap rolls, each filled with vibrant ingredients such as cucumber slices, shredded carrots, and pieces of shrimp, all encased in a layer of white rice and dark green seaweed, garnished with sesame seeds.

The image displays a plate filled with numerous small, round, golden-brown patties that appear to be pan-fried and coated with a batter, likely containing egg, as evidenced by their uniform coloration and slightly crispy texture.
The image displays an assortment of colorful Hangwa, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel hues and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image displays a box filled with an assortment of colorful Hangwa, featuring small decorative pieces in pastel hues and pressed floral or geometric patterns.

The image displays a bowl of Yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, featuring a glossy mound of sticky glutinous rice mixed with chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts, all coated in a rich, dark-brown sauce.
The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, featuring small, flower-shaped and round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with small white flowers and green leaves.

The image shows a large, round pan filled with Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced pieces of marinated beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, accompanied by green onions and other vegetables, all sizzling over a heat source.

The image displays a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili pepper, and a sprinkle of seaweed.

The image displays a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.

The image displays a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown glass noodles mixed with vibrant julienned vegetables such as carrots and green onions, garnished with sesame seeds, all coated in a glossy sheen from the sesame oil.
The Namhansanseong fortress features traditional Korean architecture with ornate tiled roofs, vibrant colors, and intricate designs, set against a backdrop of clear blue skies and autumn foliage.

The image showcases Haenggung, featuring traditional Korean architecture with wooden buildings adorned with curved tile roofs and vibrant dancheong-painted eaves, arranged around lush green courtyards.
The Paldalmun Gate features an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion, flanked by curved fortress walls adorned with traditional Korean architectural elements and red flags.
The EXPO Hanbit Tower stands prominently against the backdrop of a cloudy sky, its distinctive white structure with a disc-shaped deck and pointed spire clearly visible.
The image depicts a group of soldiers gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, indicative of a wartime scenario from The Korean War.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, indicative of a war-torn area.

The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional thatched-roof houses, people engaged in various activities, and a body of water in the foreground, set against a backdrop of rolling hills and lush greenery.
The small paper-and-coin shuttlecock (jegi) is being kicked into the air with the foot during the game of Jegichagi.
The image shows a young boy in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest over a white shirt and gray pants, kicking a small blue shuttlecock into the air with his right foot.
